# PERF-217 positive: static computation rebuilt on hot encode path (non-HTTP)
lang: go
file: PERF-217-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

func buildICCProfile() []byte {
	return []byte("icc-profile")
}

func GenerateDoc() []byte {
	// Deterministic profile rebuilt on every generate call.
	return buildICCProfile()
}
